++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++: Nothing is pretty easy to imagine, in my experience. To imagine, though. To comprehend it is a beast of an undertaking I'd rather leave to you. 23/03/2026
llllllllllllllllllll++lllllwfgllllllllll: I've always despised looking in mirrors. Sucking in the girth to look presentable, holding my breath until the result registers in my brain as my normal. I wish I could look at my body and see a person, deserving of love, without meaningful flaws at all. But that's not who I am. It's not going to work. I've settled for something simpler. I want to change the way I think, not the way I look. I've started to make progress; now, finally, I can look in the mirror, see all these imperfections and blisters and redness, and find it at least interesting. If not beautiful, I can be interesting. 24/03/2026
